issues_found: Source is a listing_page per metadata - CORE RULE #5 requires rejection of homepage, navigation, listing, or search pages
Source contains only catalogued references to historical MOA documents (1983-2025), not the documents themselves
No market structure or macro catalyst content present on the page
Topic assigned (macro catalysts) does not match actual content which is purely administrative
No economic data, policy decisions, or market-sensitive information contained herein

corrected_fields.summary: This is an administrative listing page cataloguing historical Memorandums of Agreement (MOAs) between Treasury and OMB regarding regulatory review processes under Executive Orders 12291 and 12866, along with a 2019 policy statement on tax regulatory process. The page contains links to documents dating from 1983 to 2025 but no current policy decisions, economic data, or market-relevant content.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page has no relevance to market structure or macro catalysts. It is purely an administrative reference page listing historical inter-agency agreements on regulatory review procedures. No market-sensitive information is contained herein.
